title: dryopteris lacera
intro: Dryopteris lacera, also known as the scaly male fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris lacera typically involve drying and processing the leaves, stems, and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
